Submodules

flashy.models.analysis.config module

class flashy.models.analysis.config.AnalysisConfig(values=<factory>)

Bases: ParameterContainer

Dataclass for the analysis’ configuration.

Inherits:

ParameterContainer

DEFINITIONS: ClassVar[Mapping[str, ParameterDefinition]]

Parameter definitions for analysis (See ANALYSIS_DEFINITIONS).

classmethod from_tree(root_node)

Construct an AnalysisConfig from a configuration tree.

Parameters:

root_node (TreeNode) – Root node containing analysis configuration values.

Returns:

A constructed analysis configuration instance.

Return type:

Self

validate()

Validate the analysis configuration.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

Raises:

ValueError – If configuration constraints are violated.

flashy.models.analysis.result module

class flashy.models.analysis.result.AnalysisResult(pulse_batches, config)

Bases: Struct

Container for results of an analysis for each channel.

Inherits:

msgspec.Struct

pulse_batches: List[BatchPulses]

Resulting batch of pulses. Each element represents a channel’s result.

config: ProcessingConfig

The processing configuration used for the analysis.
